task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Odoo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo main dashboard or an Odoo application screen is visible, indicating successful login with the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Calendar application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo Calendar interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting title is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Q3 Business Review' is entered into the meeting subject/title field in the event creation modal or form.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting is scheduled for next Monday at 2:00 PM for 2 hours.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The meeting date is set to the upcoming Monday, the start time is 14:00 (2:00 PM), and the end time is 16:00 (4:00 PM) or the duration is explicitly set to 2 hours.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct attendees are added to the meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The names 'Alice Johnson' and 'Bob Williams' are visible as selected tags or entries in the 'Attendees' field of the meeting form.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The meeting creation modal is closed and the 'Q3 Business Review' event is visible on the calendar grid, or the event details page is shown in a saved (non-editing) state.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the web browser to interact with Odoo.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is visible navigating the Odoo web interface. The agent did not use a terminal to send API requests (e.g., curl) or run Python scripts to create the meeting.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually filled out the Odoo event form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo event creation modal being actively filled out, rather than the agent just typing the expected output into a text editor.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing PostgreSQL commands (psql) or database manipulation scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Odoo instance is located at http://localhost:8069. The agent must log in using 'admin' for both username and password. The contacts 'Alice Johnson' and 'Bob Williams' are pre-existing synthetic data in the system. The meeting date must correspond to the Monday immediately following the system's current date.
